prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, small cross motif.

Scene: Avilia steps out of a circular comfort zone drawn on the floor. Around her are small doors labeled "话剧", "学生部门", "辩论队", "数学建模". She looks nervous but keeps moving, using a small staff to push open the first door.

Core meaning: fear did not disappear first; action came while still afraid.

Style: clean hand-drawn Chinese blog illustration, white background, dark red accents, small blue anxiety marks. Minimal labels: "顶着恐惧", "走出去", "行动".

Avoid motivational poster style, avoid dense diagram, avoid making Avilia only decorative.
